prompt:
User request:
Generate a scatter plot of sales vs customer_age colored by region with a Streamlit selectbox for product

Available columns:
product: category
revenue: float
region: category
sales: float
customer_age: int
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.title("Sales vs Customer Age")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["product"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_product = st.selectbox("Product", options)
if selected_product == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:
    df_widget = df[df["product"] == selected_product]

chart = px.scatter(
    df_widget,
    x="customer_age",
    y="sales",
    color="region",
    template="plotly_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=True)

extra.original_code:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.title("Sales vs Customer Age")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["product"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_product = st.selectbox("Product", options)
if selected_product == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:
    df_widget = df[df["product"] == selected_product]

chart = px.scatter(
    df_widget,
    x="sales",
    y="customer_age",
    color="region",
    template="plotly_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=False)

prompt:
User request:
Visualize a box plot of sales by product where product == A with a Streamlit selectbox for product

Columns in df:
product: category
date: datetime
customer_age: int
sales: float
units: int
output:
```python
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Sales by Product")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["product"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_product = st.selectbox("Product", options)

if selected_product == "All":
    df_filtered = df
else:
    df_filtered = df[df["product"] == selected_product]

fig = px.box(
    df_filtered,
    x="product",
    y="sales",
    template="simple_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)
```

extra.original_code:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Sales by Product")

df_filtered = df[df["product"] == "A"]

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["product"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_product = st.selectbox("Product", options)
if selected_product == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["product"] == selected_product]

fig = px.box(
    df_filtered_widget,
    x="product",
    y="sales",
    template="simple_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

prompt:

output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Units by Segment")

df_filtered = df[df["year"] == 2022]

chart = px.box(
    df_filtered,
    x="segment",
    y="units",
    template="simple_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=True)
